objective.title: Phase 15 progression smoke
objective.summary: Validate conservative replay progression across real lineage evidence.

hypothesis.statement: Replay moves from insufficient to partial to full only after the corresponding persisted evidence is attached.
hypothesis.expectedSignal: Replay status changes only after the relevant artifact classes exist.
hypothesis.successCriteria: No premature upgrade before the evidence chain is complete.

objective.title: Phase 15 lineage smoke
objective.summary: Validate experiment to simulation, benchmark, execution, and replay package binding.

hypothesis.statement: Write-time lineage attachment produces evidence-bounded replay progression.
hypothesis.expectedSignal: Experiment detail shows linked simulation, benchmark, execution, and replay package artifacts.
hypothesis.successCriteria: Replay remains conservative but advances when evidence exists.

objective.title: Hardening verification experiment
objective.summary: Verify registry, dataset, replay, and history integrity after the Phase 14.5 pass.

hypothesis.statement: Explicit write-time materialization should preserve durable dataset timestamps and conservative replay semantics.
hypothesis.expectedSignal: Dataset artifacts are created on writes, remain stable on reads, and replay stays evidence-bounded.
hypothesis.successCriteria: Routes return stable lineage metadata without mutating persisted artifacts during readback.

objective.title: Hardening verification experiment
objective.summary: Verify registry, dataset, replay, and history integrity after the Phase 14.5 pass.

hypothesis.statement: Explicit write-time materialization should preserve durable dataset timestamps and conservative replay semantics.
hypothesis.expectedSignal: Dataset artifacts are created on writes, remain stable on reads, and replay stays evidence-bounded.
hypothesis.successCriteria: Routes return stable lineage metadata without mutating persisted artifacts during readback.

objective.title: Replay readiness probe
objective.summary: Establish a first formal experiment for the new infrastructure surfaces.

hypothesis.statement: Formal experiment registration plus a linked snapshot will create a durable replay package.
hypothesis.expectedSignal: Experiment record is persisted with linked historical state.
hypothesis.successCriteria: Experiment can be retrieved, linked to a scenario, and included in datasets.
